title: How a man of God handles the wait
caption:
The man you're becoming is built in the wait — not in spite of it.

Most men do waiting wrong. They stall out, half-present in the season they're in, one eye on the door, grinding against time like it's the enemy.

But the wilderness is where God did some of His best work. On David before the throne. On Moses before the burning bush. On every man who needed to become something before he could carry something.

Stop fighting the season. Work it. The breakthrough only makes sense to the man who stayed faithful when there was nothing to show for it.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #vision #manofgod #discipline #christianity #scripture
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
